top_signals.title: ECB Says Extent of Inflation Shock 'Remains to Be Seen'
top_signals.summary: European Central Bank Governing Council member Olaf Sleijpen says the full extent of the inflation shock from the Iran war isn’t yet clear and that policymakers will act accordingly as data arrive. He made the comments during an interview with Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua at the ECB Forum on Central Banking in Sintra, Portugal. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Singapore Households Face Record Power Bills as War Impact Hits
top_signals.summary: Power bills for households in Singapore will hit a record next quarter as the impact of the US-Iran war feeds through, highlighting the inflationary fallout from the conflict even as regional tensions ease.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The Tech Download: How chip companies are looking to use light to solve this major AI bottleneck
top_signals.summary: Nvidia is investing billions into companies developing photonics, which industry watchers say could bring big efficiency gains to the AI sector.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Kenya’s Inflation Slows in June on Easing Food and Energy Prices
top_signals.summary: Kenya’s inflation rate eased in June for the first time since February, helped by milder increases in food and transport costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: US Stocks Head for Best Quarter Since Pandemic: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: The S&P 500 is on track to close out its best quarter in six years as the artificial intelligence trade appeared set for another day of outperformance.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Emirates NBD Said to Be in Talks to Acquire HSBC’s Turkey Unit
top_signals.summary: Emirates NBD PJSC is in talks to buy HSBC Holdings Plc’s Turkey operations, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_signals.title: A New Force Posture Concept for Europeanizing Extended Nuclear Deterrence
top_signals.summary:
During the Cold War, Europe kept asking whether Washington would risk an American city to save a European one. It was an impolite question, but a useful one, which is why it never quite left the room. It has now packed its bags and moved east. Earlier this year, French President Emmanuel Macron created quite a stir with an important speech on French nuclear weapons policy. Under what he called a new path of dissuasion avancée, or “forward deterrence,” he declared that just as French strategic submarines “dilute naturally in the oceans, guaranteeing a permanent-strike capability,” so also now will

The post A New Force Posture Concept for Europeanizing Extended Nuclear Deterrence appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ADNOC,  Eni Acquire Stakes In Gas Blocks Linked To Argentina’s LNG Project
top_signals.summary: Abu Dhabi’s XRG, the international investment arm of the Abu Dhabi National Oil Company (ADNOC), and Italy’s Eni S.p.A. (NYSE:E) have officially signed agreements to acquire minority stakes in three upstream gas blocks linked to the Argentina LNG export project. The transaction involves the Meseta Buena Esperanza, Aguada Villanueva and Las Tacanas unconventional gas blocks located in Argentina’s prolific Vaca Muerta shale basin. Under the newly signed Sale and Purchase Agreements (SPAs), XRG and Eni will each own a 32% stake,…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.summary: The JSI Alliance has successfully completed a major project in India for client Afcons Infrastructure Limited. Afcons was contracted to construct a new liquid cargo berth for Gujarat Chemical Port Ltd. (GCPL). The JSI Alliance was contracted…

top_signals.title: Ark Invest loads up on Coinbase, Circle, Bullish, Robinhood shares as stocks rally higher
top_signals.summary: Ark bought $6.85 million worth of Coinbase, $6.21 million worth of Circle Internet Group, and $3.54 million in Bullish on Monday.
